problem_text_cn: 1451 液体体膨胀系数的测量。[可供仪器和用具] 比重瓶、盛室温水的烧杯、铁支架、石棉网、煤气灯（炉）1只、分析天平、玻璃水银温度计（$0 \sim 100\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$）、搅拌器、细线等。[要求] (1) 写出用比重瓶测量液体体膨胀系数的原理和公式；(2) 写出实验的步骤；(3) 测量并记录实验数据，写出实验结果。
problem_text_en: 1451 Measure the volume expansion coefficient of liquids. [Available instruments and tools] Pycnometer, beaker with room temperature water, iron stand, asbestos gauze, gas lamp (furnace) 1 set, analytical balance, glass mercury thermometer ($0 \sim 100\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$), stirrer, thin wire, etc. [Requirements] (1) Write down the principle and formula for measuring the volume expansion coefficient of liquids using a pycnometer; (2) Write down the experimental steps; (3) Measure and record experimental data, and write down the experimental results.
img_cn: 图1451_1：比重瓶测液体体膨胀系数装置及数据处理
img_en: Fig. 1451_1: Pycnometer liquid volume expansion coefficient measuring device and data processing
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】比重瓶在 $\theta_1$、$\theta_2$ 时，$M_1 - M = \frac{\rho_0}{1 + \beta \theta_1} \cdot V_0(1 + 3\alpha \theta_1)$，$M_2 - M = \frac{\rho_0}{1 + \beta \theta_2} \cdot V_0(1 + 3\alpha \theta_2)$，联立得 $\beta - 3\alpha = \frac{M_1 - M_2}{(M_2 - M)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)}$，故 $\beta = 3\alpha + \frac{M_1 - M_2}{(M_2 - M)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)}$。代入数据：$M = 7.6797\ \mathrm{g}$，$\alpha = 3.9 \times 10^{-6}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}$，$\theta_1 = 21.70\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$M_1 = 17.8298\ \mathrm{g}$，$\theta_2 = 40.79\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$M_2 = 17.7716\ \mathrm{g}$，得 $\beta = 0.314 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}$（$21.70\ \mathrm{^\circ C} \sim 40.79\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$）。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】For pycnometer at $\theta_1$ and $\theta_2$, $M_1 - M = \frac{\rho_0}{1 + \beta \theta_1} \cdot V_0(1 + 3\alpha \theta_1)$, $M_2 - M = \frac{\rho_0}{1 + \beta \theta_2} \cdot V_0(1 + 3\alpha \theta_2)$. Solving simultaneously gives $\beta - 3\alpha = \frac{M_1 - M_2}{(M_2 - M)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)}$, so $\beta = 3\alpha + \frac{M_1 - M_2}{(M_2 - M)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)}$. Substituting data: $M = 7.6797\ \mathrm{g}$, $\alpha = 3.9 \times 10^{-6}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}$, $\theta_1 = 21.70\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $M_1 = 17.8298\ \mathrm{g}$, $\theta_2 = 40.79\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $M_2 = 17.7716\ \mathrm{g}$, get $\beta = 0.314 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}$ ($21.70\ \mathrm{^\circ C} \sim 40.79\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$).
problem_answer: 水的体膨胀系数：$\boldsymbol{0.314 \times 10^{-3}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}}$（$21.70\ \mathrm{^\circ C} \sim 40.79\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$）；测量关键：考虑玻璃线膨胀 $\alpha$，修正体膨胀系数。
